allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\), 'count:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\), 'first id+price:', d.get\('data',[{}]\)[0].get\('id'\), d.get\('data',[{}]\)[0].get\('price'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\), '\(was returning 1 before fix - silently ignored\)'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\), '\(unknown keys stripped, defaults to sort=latest\)'\)")
